contributions.detail: Qualification-depth floor applies: EB Zee (President/CPO) had genuine direct face time — 'Zycus System - Full Demo' (127 min, 21 Feb 2025) and 'Vendor Proposal' (6 May 2025) — and 4 MEDDPICC pillars (EB, decision process, decision criteria, pain) are buyer-confirmed, holding the score above a cold-deal read despite the current dark spell.

Exception statement: recorded stage is Vendor Selected (ceiling ≤85), but 330 days of buyer dark + two exco postponements + no re-scoped proposal delivered since the Oct 2025 request means the deal is BEHIND its recorded stage — score capped well down from the stage ceiling, floored at ~40-42 by the qualification-depth rule (4.4a). ► Reflect reality: move stage to Formal Evaluation/On-Hold or flag 'stalled' until exco actually reconvenes.

SAP Ariba is confirmed as the surviving finalist from the 3 Jun 2025 down-select, with a live, unresolved secondary-integration-fee objection ACEN was negotiating directly with SAP — the 'Vendor Selected' label looks ahead of the true competitive reality.
Champion has gone quiet: Zee drove strong 2024-2025 advocacy but current contact is rep-initiated only since the Sep/Oct 2025 postponements, with no logged response.

Zycus's AI/GenAI depth (Merlin contract risk scoring, GenAI chatbot) was repeatedly highlighted across 2025 demos and the May 2026 revival attempt is explicitly anchored on Agentic AI — a credible re-engagement hook given ACEN's organic AI interest.
Paper process is only 'partial' in MEDDPICC and no confirmed budget exists — exco has twice declared budget/resourcing 'not feasible.'
330 days of buyer silence — last real buyer meeting was 13 Aug 2025 ('Project SAPAY'); zero meetings logged in the last 30/60/90 days and nothing scheduled forward.
All 2026 Next-Step entries (16 Mar 'intro mail requesting revival meeting', 4 May 'reached out to Zee for lunch') are rep-initiated with no logged buyer reply — one-way outreach, not engagement.
Close date has slipped out to 31-Jan-2027, far beyond the Q2/Q3 2025 close the Next-Step trail was originally chasing — a major, repeated push.
ACEN exco has twice deferred budget/resourcing (22 Sep 2025, and an earlier Jun 2025 delay to Q1 2026) — Zycus is driving 100% of the cadence, ACEN never initiates.
Some residual warmth on record: ACEN told the rep on 22 Sep 2025 they were 'still interested' and would reconnect in Jan 2026, giving a legitimate (if stalled) revival thread.
No buyer-owned action items currently open — no confirmed reply to the Mar/May 2026 revival outreach.
ACEN's own exco has twice deferred budget/resourcing decisions (22 Sep 2025; earlier delay to Q1 2026) rather than moving the paper process forward.

Real prior investment on record: ACEN requested a full architecture walkthrough (28 Jul 2025, delivered 4 Sep 2025) and asked for revised commercials/integration scope (Sep-Oct 2025) — genuine buyer-driven asks, just historical.
Champion and paper-process status are both only 'partial' in MEDDPICC — no active procurement or security motion currently confirmed.
330 days of total buyer silence despite repeated rep outreach (Jan, Mar, May 2026) — a textbook stall pattern.
Close date pushed out to 31-Jan-2027, well beyond the Q2/Q3 2025 target the Next-Step trail was originally working toward — recurring slippage with no new committed date from the buyer.
SAP Ariba remains an active, confirmed-surviving competitor with an unresolved integration-cost objection ACEN was negotiating directly with SAP as recently as May 2025.
Stage (Vendor Selected) and forecast (Best Case) both look inflated against the evidence — no confirmed selection, an active rival, and a project twice postponed by ACEN's exco for budget reasons.
No confirmed champion currently driving internally — Zee's engagement has cooled to rep-chased-only since Sep/Oct 2025.
